originalTitle: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | Vault Edition Trailer
content: Lock in and look lethal doing it. The Modern Warfare 4 Vault Edition comes fully loaded, featuring: 🤝 Hostile Alliance Operator Pack (4 Operator Skins) ⚔️ Special Forces Operator Pack (4 Operator Skins) 💥 Signature Weapon Collection (5 Signature Weapon Blueprints) 💰 One Season of BlackCell ➕ DMZ Deployment Bonus Pre-Order now: https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4 About the Game: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare® 4 War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world in Call of Duty®: Modern Warfare® 4. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control. Modern Warfare® 4 pushes the series into darker and more dangerous territory, where consequence and escalation bring long-running storylines to a powerful and emotional breaking point. Follow #CallofDuty for the latest intel: • X / (Formerly Twitter): http://twitter.com/CallofDuty • Instagram: http://instagram.com/callofduty • Facebook: http://facebook.com/CallofDuty • TikTok: http://www.tiktok.com/@callofduty • Discord: https://discord.gg/callofdutyofficial • Threads: https://www.threads.net/@callofduty • Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/callofduty.com
chineseContent: 锁定并看起来很致命。 《现代战争 4 Vault 版》满载，包含： 🤝 敌对联盟操作员包（4 个操作员皮肤） ⚔️ 特种部队操作员包（4 个操作员皮肤） 💥 标志性武器收藏（5 个标志性武器蓝图） 💰 BlackCell 一季 ➕ DMZ 部署奖励 立即预购：https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4 关于游戏：使命召唤：现代战争® 4 在《使命召唤®：现代战争® 4》中，朝鲜发动全面入侵，威胁到世界的稳定，朝鲜半岛爆发了战争。一队年轻的韩国士兵在崩溃的前线为生存而战，而在半个地球之外，复仇心切的普莱斯上尉在暗处发动了一场个人战争，他领先追捕他的人一步。当普莱斯的书外任务与入侵背后的势力发生冲突时，战争蔓延到了任何人都无法控制的范围。 《现代战争® 4》将该系列推向更黑暗、更危险的领域，其后果和升级将长期的故事情节推向了强大而情感的转折点。关注#CallofDuty 了解最新信息： • X /（以前的 Twitter）：http://twitter.com/CallofDuty • Instagram：http://instagram.com/callofduty • Facebook：http://facebook.com/CallofDuty • TikTok：http://www.tiktok.com/@callofduty • Discord：https://discord.gg/callofdutyofficial • 主题：https://www.threads.net/@callofduty • 蓝天：https://bsky.app/profile/callofduty.com
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
